title: 2 Pack Smoke Alarms for Home – 10-Year Life Fire Alarms with 5-Year Replaceable Battery, EN14604 Certified Photoelectric Smoke Detector with Silence Button, LED Light, for Kitchen, Caravan, Office
features: 🏡 Advanced Optical Detection for Rapid Response || Safeguard your family with this 2 pack smoke alarm for home, featuring photoelectric (optical) sensing technology. It swiftly detects smoke from slow-burning fires — essential for enhancing protection in any home, office, flat, or caravan.

⏱️ 10-Year Sensor Life with Replaceable 5-Year Battery || Engineered for lasting safety, each fire alarm for home offers a durable 10-year lifespan and comes pre-equipped with a 5-year battery. No wiring, no fuss — just replace the battery when needed to keep your battery operated smoke alarm active.

📢 Loud 85dB Alarm & Flashing LED Light || When danger strikes, the alarm emits a powerful 85dB siren with a red LED alert — easily heard across bedrooms, kitchens, hallways, stairways, lofts, and offices. A reliable smoke detector for home with visual and audio warnings.

🔇 Silence Button to Prevent Nuisance Alarms || Minimise false alarms with the handy test/silence button — ideal for kitchens or areas with steam. Temporarily silence the alarm during cooking; it reactivates automatically for continued monitoring.

✅ EN14604 Certified with Auto Self-Test || These smoke detectors for home meet the strict EN14604 safety standard. An automatic self-check runs every 33 seconds, shown by a flashing LED, confirming the fire alarm's status without interrupting your day.

🛠️ Effortless DIY Installation || Designed for convenience, this battery smoke alarm installs in minutes using included screws and mounting brackets — no rewiring required. Great for landlords, new builds, or renters upgrading their home fire detectors.

🛡️ Durable Flame-Retardant Construction || Made from high-quality ABS+PC, this smoke alarm withstands high temperatures. Its flame-retardant design ensures extra protection and long-term reliability in all environments — from your home to your caravan or garage.
description: Product Description Advanced Optical Sensor for Precise Smoke Detection Enhance your home safety with our photoelectric smoke alarm , equipped with advanced optical sensing technology . Designed to detect smoke from slow-burning fires faster than traditional models, it delivers a rapid, accurate response by intelligently analyzing smoke particle patterns. Whether installed in your kitchen, hallway, or caravan , this optical smoke alarm ensures early warnings when it matters most. Built to last, our EN14604-certified smoke detector offers a robust 10-year sensor lifespan , ensuring your home is protected year after year without the hassle of frequent replacements. Crafted from durable, fire-retardant ABS+PC material, it’s a reliable choice for home smoke alarms in the UK. Enjoy fast, tool-free setup with this battery operated smoke alarm . Everything you need is included — screws, brackets, and clear instructions — making it ideal for renters, homeowners, or landlords installing fire alarms for home in multiple rooms like flats, offices, or stairways . Stay protected without interruption. This battery smoke detector emits a clear warning sound when the battery runs low, giving you time to replace it and keep your smoke detector battery operated and active. No surprises, just continuous peace of mind. When smoke is detected, the alarm triggers a loud 85dB siren paired with a bright red LED indicator — designed to grab attention even in larger areas like bedrooms, kitchens, or garages . This dual warning system ensures that everyone in the area is alerted promptly. For added safety, this fire detector smoke detector performs an automatic self-test every 33 seconds, confirmed by a blinking LED. It also includes a manual test button , allowing you to easily confirm functionality. Reliable for long-term use in any residential fire alarm system. Upgrade your fire safety with this battery operated smoke alarm 2 pack . With its 10-year life , 5-year replaceable battery , and intelligent photoelectric sensor , it's perfect for homes, caravans , and anywhere you need reliable smoke alarms for home . Combining top-tier detection with effortless installation and maintenance, this smoke alarm delivers dependable protection with every beep. Highly Sensitive Real-Time Detection: Your Ultimate Safety Boost your home’s protection with our high-sensitivity smoke alarm , engineered for real-time detection of both smoldering fires and sudden flare-ups. Using advanced photoelectric (optical) sensing technology , this alarm reacts instantly to the presence of smoke, delivering faster alerts than traditional ionisation models. Whether installed in your kitchen, bedroom, hallway, or caravan , it ensures your family is warned the moment danger is detected. Every second counts in a fire emergency. That’s why our battery operated smoke alarm features a powerful 85-decibel siren paired with a bright flashing red LED light . This dual-alert system guarantees visibility and audibility — even in larger rooms or noisy environments. From homes and flats to offices and garages , this smoke detector ensures no warning goes unnoticed. Compact Size, Stylish Look, and Lightweight Design Our smoke alarm is crafted not only for high performance but also to blend effortlessly into your home’s interior. With its compact size and sleek, modern look , it installs discreetly on ceilings or walls — perfect for homeowners seeking elegant smoke detectors that don’t compromise on aesthetics. Weighing less than most traditional units, this lightweight smoke alarm is easy to handle and quick to install. Whether placing it in a flat, office, hallway, or caravan , its portable, unobtrusive design makes positioning effortless — no heavy tools or complex setup needed. Upgrade your protection with a battery operated smoke detector that’s as visually appealing as it is functional. The combination of minimalist design and premium build quality ensures your home stays both safe and stylish — from ceiling to stairway. Our smoke alarms for home are built for precision and reliability, using advanced photoelectric optical sensor technology to detect smoke fast and accurately. As shown in the internal diagram, each component works seamlessly to provide dependable protection from slow-burning fires — ideal for every room in your home, office, or caravan. At the heart of the system lies a precision smoke sensor , engineered to detect fine smoke particles. This sensor is especially effective against smouldering fires , giving early warning even when flames are not yet visible — essential for safe evacuation and damage prevention. An integrated smart processing circuit filters out common triggers like dust and cooking fumes, helping reduce nuisance alarms while still delivering immediate alerts when real smoke is detected. Ideal for use as a kitchen smoke alarm or in busy areas. This battery operated smoke detector comes with a pre-installed 5-year battery and supports easy replacement when needed — ensuring uninterrupted operation throughout its 10-year sensor lifespan . The included fitting base is built for long-term stability. It locks the alarm firmly in place on ceilings or walls, making it suitable for all environments — from bedrooms and hallways to utility rooms, garages, and flats . The accessible test button on the front side of the alarm makes weekly testing quick and simple. A flashing red LED confirms that your alarm is working and running its 33-second self-check cycle in the background — giving you peace of mind, 24/7. Keep your home and loved ones safe with our advanced smoke alarms for home , designed with photoelectric optical sensing technology for early and accurate smoke detection. These alarms respond rapidly to fire hazards, giving you valuable time to act — whether you're awake or asleep. From bedrooms and living rooms to kitchens, garages, lofts, basements, and utility areas , our alarms are suitable for a wide range of environments. Proper placement is essential for maximum effectiveness — use our Smoke Alarm Placement Guide (see image) to install alarms in high-risk and high-traffic areas , creating a protective network throughout your property. Whether you're protecting sleeping occupants or covering potential danger zones like kitchen smoke alarm areas or garage fire detectors , these alarms offer long-lasting, battery-operated protection . They install in minutes with the included hardware and require minimal maintenance, making them an essential part of any home’s fire safety system. Upgrade your safety today with a trusted, easy-to-use battery smoke detector system backed by EN14604 certification, smart self-testing, and powerful audio-visual alerts. With proper placement and regular testing, these home fire alarms become your first and most vital line of defense — because nothing matters more than protecting the people you love. Protect Your Home with Confidence Safeguarding your home and loved ones is essential — and our photoelectric smoke alarm offers the trusted protection you need. Equipped with advanced optical sensor technology , it swiftly detects smoke and triggers a loud 85dB alarm with a flashing red LED, ensuring you're alerted in real time. Whether you're looking for a battery operated smoke alarm , a 10-year smoke detector , or a complete fire alarm 2 pack , this unit delivers reliability, fast response, and peace of mind. Perfect for use in bedrooms, kitchens, garages, flats, and offices , it installs easily without rewiring and fits seamlessly into any décor. Designed to meet EN14604 standards , it combines performance and style for lasting home protection. Choose our smoke alarm for comprehensive coverage — from single units to battery smoke alarms for home 2 pack setups — and protect what matters most. Designed with user convenience in mind, this alarm comes with all necessary mounting screws. There’s no need for complex wiring or professional tools — just secure it with the included screws, and your smoke detector is ready to protect your home. Whether you're placing it in a bedroom, hallway, kitchen, or garage , the installation process is fast and stress-free. Our intuitive design ensures that anyone — from first-time DIYers to experienced homeowners — can install the unit confidently in minutes. Enjoy peace of mind with a reliable smoke alarm that’s as easy to install as it is essential for safety.
